suggestions.title: Add MEDIUM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN for dual publishing
suggestions.description: Publish same articles to Medium + dev.to; doubles article reach with zero extra LLM cost
how_to: Step 1: Go to Medium Partner Program and create an account
Step 2: Generate an integration token in the Medium settings
Step 3: Add the token as a GitHub secret named MEDIUM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN

suggestions.title: Upgrade to Groq Dev Tier for increased LLM usage
suggestions.description: Increase the daily token limit for LLM usage
how_to: Step 1: Go to the Groq console and navigate to the billing settings
Step 2: Upgrade to the Dev Tier plan
Step 3: Verify the increased token limit in the Groq console

suggestions.title: Add TWITTER_API_KEY for Twitter integration
suggestions.description: Enable Twitter posting and increase reach
how_to: Step 1: Go to the Twitter Developer Dashboard and create an app
Step 2: Generate an API key and secret in the Twitter settings
Step 3: Add the API key and secret as GitHub secrets named TWITTER_API_KEY and TWITTER_API_SECRET
